title: Crotonogyne ikelembensis
taxonomy: Crotonogyne ikelembensis belongs to the family Asphodelaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the asphodel or lilyturf family. This family is part of the larger order Asparagales, which includes many other flowering plant families. The genus Crotonogyne is also part of this family, and it is native to tropical Africa. The Asphodelaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with the Crotonogyninae being one of the subfamilies. The classification of Crotonogyne ikelembensis reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
